channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - Current
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status Current from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Albuterol Sulfate Solution (0487-9901-30)
item.description: Albuterol Sulfate, Solution, 2.5 mg/.5 mL (NDC 0487-9901-30) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-15 Company: Nephron Pharmaceuticals Corporation Albuterol 0.5% is in stock, though demand remains high; additional supply can be produced as needed.
